_schema_note: This file acts as the Static Registry. All top-level objects MUST contain a '_description' key explaining their purpose.

repositories._description: Maps local repository names to their overarching GitHub Project Board Node IDs. Serves as the primary 1:1 lookup for context.

field_ids._description: Maps specific field Node IDs (e.g., Status) for each Project Board. Keys match the repository name due to the 1:1 repo-to-board architecture.

option_ids._description: Static Node IDs for single-select options (e.g., 'Backlog' status) that remain constant across all boards spawned from the Master Template.

services._description: Configuration definitions for internal infrastructure services, including environment variable mappings and default ports.

standard_labels._description: Corporate standard issue labels. These are automatically synchronized to new repositories upon creation.

refactor.description: Code changes that improve structure without changing functionality

epic.description: A large, high-level goal that encompasses multiple smaller tasks

standard_fields._description: The Standard Taxonomy for extended project fields (Priority, Size). Defines valid types and options for string-based updates via the gh CLI.
